# Shield.io badge candidates — Forge & Java base64 logos

## Candidate 1 — `for-the-badge` style, orange Forge + Java

```markdown
[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-FF6600?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17-ED8B00?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://adoptium.net)
```

[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-FF6600?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17-ED8B00?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://adoptium.net)

---

## Candidate 2 — `flat-square` style, white text on brand color

```markdown
[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-FF6600?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17-ED8B00?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://adoptium.net)
```

[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-FF6600?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17-ED8B00?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://adoptium.net)

---

## Candidate 3 — Dark label, orange value, `for-the-badge` style

```markdown
[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-181717?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=FF6600&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17-181717?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=ED8B00&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://adoptium.net)
```

[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-181717?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=FF6600&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17-181717?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=ED8B00&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://adoptium.net)

---

## Candidate 4 — `plastic` style, glossy rounded, brand colors

```markdown
[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-FF6600?style=plastic&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17-ED8B00?style=plastic&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://adoptium.net)
```

[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.20.1-FF6600?style=plastic&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17-ED8B00?style=plastic&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://adoptium.net)

## Candidate 5 — White bg + colored brand icons, `for-the-badge` style

```markdown
[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/-1.20.1-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&label=Forge&labelColor=ffffff&color=000000)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/-17-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&label=Java&labelColor=ffffff&color=000000)](https://adoptium.net)
```

[![Forge 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/-1.20.1-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&label=Forge&labelColor=ffffff&color=000000)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
[![Java 17](https://img.shields.io/badge/-17-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&label=Java&labelColor=ffffff&color=000000)](https://adoptium.net)

---

## Summary

| # | Style | Forge bg | Java bg | Logo color |
|---|-------|----------|---------|------------|
| 1 | `for-the-badge` | Orange `#FF6600` | Java orange `#ED8B00` | White on brand |
| 2 | `flat-square` | Orange `#FF6600` | Java orange `#ED8B00` | White on brand |
| 3 | `for-the-badge` | Label = orange, value = dark `#181717` | same | Inverse: brand on white |
| 4 | `plastic` (glossy) | Orange `#FF6600` | Java orange `#ED8B00` | White logo on brand bg |
| 5 | `for-the-badge` | White label, black value | same | Brand color logo on white |
